name: cueline
description: Use a ChatGPT web conversation as the controller for durable local agent work.

interface.shortDescription: Let ChatGPT Pro direct durable local agent runs.
interface.longDescription: CueLine lets a ChatGPT web conversation plan, dispatch, inspect, and complete local agent work while Codex validates commands, executes registered workers, and persists the run.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $cueline to let the open ChatGPT conversation direct this task.
